mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE ancestors AS ( SELECT m.id, m.name, m.gender, m.birth_year, m.death_year, m.generation, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS parent_id, 0 AS depth FROM members m WHERE m.id = #{memberId} UNION ALL SELECT m.id, m.name, m.gender, m.birth_year, m.death_year, m.generation, r.from_member_id AS parent_id, a.depth + 1 FROM members m JOIN relations r ON r.to_member_id = m.id AND r.relation_type IN ('PARENT_SON','PARENT_DAUGHTER','MOTHER_SON','MOTHER_DAUGHTER') JOIN ancestors a ON a.id = r.to_member_id WHERE a.depth < 100 ) SELECT DISTINCT id, name, gender, birth_year, death_year, generation, parent_id, depth FROM ancestors ORDER BY depth;

WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT m.id, m.name, m.gender, m.birth_year, m.generation, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS parent_id, 0 AS depth FROM members m WHERE m.id = #{memberId} UNION ALL SELECT m.id, m.name, m.gender, m.birth_year, m.generation, r.from_member_id AS parent_id, d.depth + 1 FROM members m JOIN relations r ON r.from_member_id = d.id AND r.relation_type IN ('PARENT_SON','PARENT_DAUGHTER','MOTHER_SON','MOTHER_DAUGHTER') JOIN descendants d ON d.id = r.from_member_id WHERE d.depth < #{maxDepth} ) SELECT id, name, gender, birth_year, generation, parent_id, depth FROM descendants ORDER BY depth, id;
